title: croton pallidus
intro: Croton pallidus, also known as the 'bushy croton', is a plant species in the Euphorbiaceae family. It is traditionally used in folk medicine, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Croton pallidus include its potential to reduce fever, relieve pain, and support wound healing. The plant is commonly prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its extracts are also used in herbal preparations, such as salves and ointments, to promote skin health and tissue repair.
